name: codex-flows-monorepo
description: Codex-native stdio agent, turn automation, SSH workspace operation, and generic HTTP proxy tools.

scripts.build: vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs build
scripts.check:types: vp run --concurrency-limit 1 --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs check:types && vp run -w docs:check
